title: Diagnose ObjC++ callbacks that let +0 async payloads escape into C++-owned state without retain/copy
feature: ObjC++ interop for ownership, throws, and async lowering parity

diagnostics.message: ObjC++ callback result payload is +0 and must be retained or copied before escaping callback scope
ObjC++ callback error payload is +0 and must be retained or copied before escaping callback scope
